_comment: Per-bot config. Place at ~/.xclaw/<id>/config.json. Holds this bot's token + overrides. data/, workspace/, memory/, skills/ are derived siblings — do not set them.

sdk._comment_gateway: Model-gateway routing (driver-neutral). Mapped per driver: claude→ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL/ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN, codex→OPENAI_BASE_URL/OPENAI_API_KEY.
sdk._comment_env: Extra env vars injected into the agent CLI (merged per-key over the global sdk.env). Useful for OCTO_BOT_ID, GH_TOKEN, GLAB_TOKEN, etc.
